overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a dark underground industrial settlement. The character moves through neon-lit market areas, debris-filled corridors, and a massive cavern containing a crashed vehicle, encountering various NPCs and environmental details along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground market with food vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded underground market past vending machines and groups of NPCs

notable_agents.action: standing at a burrito vending machine

entered.detail: green automated vending machine with red BURRITO XXL signage
brightly lit kiosk with green and pink neon signage
massive concrete support pillars lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bustling underground market area illuminated by neon signs. The character moves past a prominent green burrito vending machine on the left and a brightly lit kiosk on the right, navigating through scattered groups of standing NPCs near large industrial pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial debris field with construction barriers

events.description: moves from the market area into a debris-filled industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through a cluttered industrial area with construction barriers and scattered debris

notable_agents.action: armed guard in tactical gear walking ahead
worker in orange vest walking past

entered.detail: metal crowd control barriers with red and white stripes
large pile of rubble and construction materials
corrugated metal sheets and temporary flooring

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the market, the character enters a narrower industrial corridor filled with construction debris. Metal barriers block off hazardous areas while the character passes armed guards and workers navigating the cluttered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark maintenance corridor with yellow emergency lighting

events.description: enters a darker corridor with dim yellow industrial lighting
discovers a body with glowing green cyberware on the ground

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through a dark corridor, examining a body on the ground with glowing implants

notable_agents.action: two NPCs standing and conversing in the distance

entered.detail: harsh yellow overhead lights casting deep shadows
stacked metal storage cabinets against the wall
corpse on the ground surrounded by glowing green cybernetic implants

segments.scene_description: The environment darkens significantly as the character enters a maintenance corridor lit by harsh yellow industrial lights. The character discovers a corpse surrounded by glowing green cyberware on the ground while distant figures converse further down the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground plaza with campfire and staircases

events.description: exits the dark corridor into a larger space with a burning barrel
begins ascending a large concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: walking past a campfire with seated NPCs and ascending a wide staircase

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting by a burning barrel
person walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: metal barrel with open fire providing warm orange light
wide concrete staircase with red neon strip lighting on the edges

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark corridor, the character enters a larger plaza area warmed by a burning barrel where NPCs sit nearby. The character then begins ascending a wide concrete staircase illuminated by red neon strips, passing other pedestrians moving in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: massive underground cavern with crashed aircraft

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs revealing a vast cavern with a crashed vehicle
descends into the cavern toward the crashed vehicle

agents.ego_description: descending stairs into a massive underground chamber and approaching a crashed vehicle

notable_agents.action: person in a hat walking down the stairs
figure standing on an upper walkway

entered.detail: large crashed aircraft or vehicle with orange accent lighting on a raised platform
enormous angled steel beams supporting the cavern ceiling
elevated walkways and platforms on the cavern walls

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs reveals a breathtaking vast underground cavern dominated by a crashed vehicle resting on a central platform. The character descends toward the wreckage while massive support beams crisscross the ceiling high above, and other figures move through the expansive space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense underground settlement that transitions from a vibrant neon market into a vast, cavernous industrial void. It begins by weaving through a bustling market area past a green burrito machine and glowing kiosks, before narrowing into a cluttered industrial corridor filled with construction debris and armed guards. The environment then darkens significantly as the camera moves through a maintenance passage lit by harsh yellow lights and marked by a corpse with glowing green cyberware, before opening up into a plaza warmed by a burning barrel. As the character ascends a wide concrete staircase lined with red neon strips, the scene finally expands into a breathtaking underground cavern dominated by a massive crashed vehicle resting beneath a ceiling of crisscrossing support beams.
